goals: Store a preference about communication style for future interactions
Search for previously stored preferences to verify what was remembered
Review all stored memories to see what context has been retained
Remove an outdated or incorrect memory

memories.text: User works in humanitarian aid, prefers brief and direct communication

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and focused on results. Prefers efficiency in communication due to demanding work in difficult environments. Values straightforward interactions over lengthy explanations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic memory concepts but does not know specific tool names or APIs. Expects the assistant to handle memory management transparently without requiring technical knowledge.

end_condition: The user has successfully added a preference memory, verified it was stored by searching, reviewed all stored memories, and removed an outdated memory. The task is complete when all four goals have been achieved.
